rows.label: qev041602_MSG0001
rows.name: A customer, mo! Welcome, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0002
rows.name:
You are not a customer, mo?
Kutta asked you to search for the "huge thing" that stole his cargo, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0003
rows.name: I saw it, I saw it! Wanana saw the "huge thing," mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0004
rows.name:
It appeared from the sky, mo!
At first, the surroundings suddenly grew dark, and I was surprised, thinking night had suddenly fallen, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0005
rows.name: Then, that huge thing appeared from the sky, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0006
rows.name: It had two arms and two legs, and it used them deftly to snatch the cargo and fly away, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0007
rows.name:
It all happened in an absolute instant, mo!
It was even faster than a drop of water evaporating on a hot stone, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0008
rows.name:
After snatching the cargo, it flew off to the west, mo!
It also felt a bit south, but it was definitely in the direction of Wanana's left hand, so there is no mistake, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0009
rows.name: However, Wanana has no idea which direction I was facing at the time, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0010
rows.name:
But that is just a trivial detail, mo!
Do not worry about it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0011
rows.name:
I want you to get the cargo back quickly, mo.
Otherwise, our business will suffer, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0012
rows.name: Profits going up is good, but business suffering is something we cannot afford, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0013
rows.name: Wanana has been thinking, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0014
rows.name: The true identity of the "huge thing" might actually be a tiny thing riding inside a huge machine, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0015
rows.name: And that tiny thing is actually a master thief, and the cargo has already been sold off, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0016
rows.name:
You were one step too late, mo!
It is surely impossible to get the cargo back now, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0017
rows.name:
Oh? You have a rather triumphant look on your face, mo.
Did something good happen, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0018
rows.name:
Mo-mo!?
You actually defeated the "huge thing" and took back the cargo, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0019
rows.name:
You are quite something, mo~
That is an achievement worthy of being granted the title of a legendary hero, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041602_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now then!
Hurry up and hand the cargo over to the leader, mo~[ST:wait ]
